name: Karan Dubey
raw_text:
Karan Dubey
Data Analyst
Nawada, New Delhi-110059 — karandubey25kd@gmail.com — +91 7704969739
LinkedIn — GitHub
Career Objective
Aspiring Data Analyst with a BTech 2026 degree and hands-on skills in Excel, SQL, Python &
Power BI. Passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful insights that drive smart
business decisions. Ready to bring fresh energy, analytical thinking, and a growth mindset to a
forward-thinking team.
Education
Bachelor of Technology (CSE)
2022 – 2026
Teerthanker Mahaveer University, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh
Intermediate
2020 – 2021
Shanti Smarak I C, Amaura Azamgarh, Uttar Pradesh
High School
2018 – 2019
Shanti Smarak I C, Amaura Azamgarh, Uttar Pradesh
Experience
CodSoft – Data Analysis Internship
• Completed a virtual internship involving real-world data analysis projects.
• Cleaned, processed, and analyzed datasets using Python and Excel.
• Conducted exploratory data analysis (EDA) and created meaningful visualizations.
• Prepared structured reports and delivered actionable insights within project timelines.
Projects
Virat Kohli IPL Performance Dashboard
• Created an interactive dashboard to visualize cricket performance over the years.
• Analyzed match-wise data including runs, strike rate, centuries, and performance trends.
• Used charts and slicers for dynamic filtering.
• Identified patterns, peak performance periods, and consistency.
• Tools Used: Power BI (DAX, Charts, Filters)
Movie Recommendation System
• Built a content-based movie recommendation system using Python.
• Used dataset with features like title, genre, cast, and keywords.
• Applied CountVectorizer and Cosine Similarity.
• Tools Used: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn
Telecom Analytics Dashboard
• Analyzed 10,000+ telecom records across 10 countries using PostgreSQL and SQL.
• Built 11 interactive Power BI visualizations covering Revenue, Churn, and ARPU metrics.
• Identified key business insights to support data-driven decision-making.
• Tools Used: PostgreSQL, Power BI, SQL
Certifications
Master of Data Analytics Program — The iScale
Skills
Programming Languages: Python
Libraries: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib
Database Management: SQL, MySQL
Technical Skills: Excel, Power BI
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Leadership, Time Management
